scripts.prepush: npm run typecheck:server && npm test && npm run build:client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "docker compose up --build" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:host-server: docker compose up -d db && concurrently -n server,client,dashboard -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && DATABASE_URL=postgres://aitown:aitown_dev@localhost:5432/aitown npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1" "npm run open:dashboard"
